calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-27-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Luke Garvey appeared on behalf of Plaintiff/Respondent August "Paul" Marino, also present.
Mark Carton appeared on behalf of Defendant/Appellant Jason Annecone, also present.
This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.
Plaintiff/Respondent August "Paul" Marino sworn and examined.
Defendant/Appellant Jason Annecone sworn and examined.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Plaintiff/Respondent's Exhibit 1: Chase Credit Card Statement March 2021 EVID
Plaintiff/Respondent's Exhibit 2: CAB Invoice EVID
Plaintiff/Respondent's Exhibit 3: (Exhibit A) - printout of text messages EVID
Plaintiff/Respondent's Exhibit 4: (Exhibit B) Police report EVID
Plaintiff/Respondent's Exhibit 5: (Exhibit C) Supplemental police report EVID
Plaintiff/Respondent's Exhibit 6: (Exhibit D) - Photographs EVID
Defense/Appellant's Exhibit A: Printouts of text messages EVID
Defense/Appellant's Exhibit B: American Express card
Defense/Appellant's Exhibit C: Craigslist ad for ebike
All exhibits are admitted into Evidence.
Appellant's and Respondent's exhibits are retained.

After settlement discussions, the case has settled.
Judge: Jeffrey S. Ross; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported. (502)
